title: The Word Made Flesh in Her
subtitle: Gabriel comes to Nazareth, and the eternal Word descends into the Virgin's womb

stillness: Be still, and remember the beginnings of your salvation.
These words are full of mysteries; ponder them in your heart,
for in them the whole sum of our redemption rests.
gospel: In the sixth month the angel Gabriel was sent from God
into a city of Galilee, called Nazareth,
to a virgin espoused to a man whose name was Joseph,
and the virgin's name was Mary.
And the angel said: Hail, full of grace, the Lord is with thee.
He shall be great, and shall be called the Son of the Most High.
Then said Mary to the angel:
How shall this be done, because I know not man?
behold: Behold and attend to each thing, as if you were present.
Behold Gabriel, one of the first princes of God's kingdom,
sent down into a small and lowly town.
The Lord, unlike the kings of earth,
did not choose a great city for His espousals,
in which He joined human nature to Himself,
but Nazareth, the little town, for an example of humility,
to teach us always to choose lowly places.
Behold the true Flower, conceived in the flower,
of the flower, and among the flowers:
Christ, in Nazareth, of the Blessed Virgin, in the season of flowers.
Behold Mary, troubled at his word,
neither daring to disbelieve the angel,
nor rashly to claim the things of God.
consider: At the same hour Eve was seduced by the devil,
Mary was instructed by the Archangel.
Consider that God willed to restore man in the very order he had fallen.
Man fell: the devil destining, the serpent carrying it out,
He is repaired in the same order, reversed:
God destining, the angel carrying it out,
He who has a Father in heaven without a mother,
would have on earth a Mother without a father.
As the first Adam was made of the virgin earth,
so the second Adam was made man of the Virgin.
As through Eve the virgin came the ruin of the human race,
so through Mary the Virgin came its repair.
This is the Mary called Star of the Sea:
through the sea of this world she steers sinners to the harbour of penance.
If you feel yourself tossed among storms and tempests,
more adrift than walking on solid ground —
look to the star, call upon Mary.
prayer: O Jesus, Son of the living God,
who by the will of the Father, the Holy Spirit working with Him,
came forth from that same Father's bosom
like a river flowing from a place of delight,
bending down through the lowly valleys,
looking upon the lowliness of Thy handmaid,
and didst descend into the womb of the Virgin,
where, conceived ineffably, Thou didst take flesh:
let Thy grace descend, O merciful Jesus, eagerly,
through the merits of the Mother and Virgin,
upon me, Thy most unworthy servant,
that through her I may desire Thee,
and within, in love, may conceive Thee;
and through that same grace working in me,
may bring forth the saving fruits of good works. Amen.

latinJewel.latin: Conveniens enim fuit, ut verus flos, id est Christus, conciperetur in flore, id est, in Nazareth; et de flore, id est, de Beata Virgine; et cum floribus, id est, tempore florum.
latinJewel.english: For it was fitting that the true Flower, that is Christ, should be conceived in the flower, that is, in Nazareth; and of the flower, that is, of the Blessed Virgin; and with the flowers, that is, in the season of flowers.
